hooks.command: input=$(cat); sid=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // empty' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-6); name="$(basename "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-Claude}")${sid:+#$sid}"; (curl -s -m 1 -G http://localhost:4123/notify --data-urlencode state=working --data-urlencode "ai=$name" >/dev/null 2>&1 &)

input=$(cat); sid=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // empty' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-6); name="$(basename "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-Claude}")${sid:+#$sid}"; (curl -s -m 1 -G http://localhost:4123/notify --data-urlencode state=done --data-urlencode "ai=$name" >/dev/null 2>&1 &)

input=$(cat); sid=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // empty' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-6); name="$(basename "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-Claude}")${sid:+#$sid}"; (curl -s -m 1 -G http://localhost:4123/notify --data-urlencode state=waiting --data-urlencode "ai=$name" >/dev/null 2>&1 &)

input=$(cat); sid=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // empty' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-6); name="$(basename "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-Claude}")${sid:+#$sid}"; (curl -s -m 1 -G http://localhost:4123/notify --data-urlencode state=ended --data-urlencode "ai=$name" >/dev/null 2>&1 &)
